features.name: full_case attribute on case statement
features.description: Code should include a case statement with the (* full_case *) attribute applied before it
features.snippet: (* full_case *) case (a) 2'd0: x = 3'b001; 2'd1: x = 3'b010; 2'd2: x = 3'b100; endcase

features.name: incomplete case item coverage with full_case
features.description: Code should include a case statement marked with full_case where not all possible case values are explicitly covered by case items

features.name: full_case with 2-bit case expression
features.description: Code should include a case statement with full_case attribute where a 2-bit expression has only 3 case items, leaving one value uncovered
